Title: Spec Tighten Cycle
Description: Audit a spec subtree, write gap analysis, fix findings via repeated `next`, re-audit, and loop until the score meets TargetScore or MaxLoops is reached.

Variables.Name: TargetFolder
Variables.Description: Spec subtree to audit, relative to repo root (e.g. spec/21-app).

Variables.Name: Depth
Variables.Description: Max depth to walk during the audit.

Variables.Name: FixBatchSize
Variables.Description: How many `next` keywords to emit per fix pass.

Steps.Message: Starting fix loop (batch={{ FixBatchSize }}, loop={{ LoopCount }}/{{ MaxLoops }}).
Spec tighten complete. LastScore={{ LastScore }}/100 after {{ LoopCount }} loop(s).
